name: compliance: a single rule may map to multiple controls; all are recorded in the coverage map
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-compliance "$PWD/COMPLIANCE.yaml" >/dev/null 2>&1 && grep -E '"6.5.1":' COMPLIANCE.yaml 1>&2 && grep -E '"6.5.7":' COMPLIANCE.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p tree && printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - id: r1
    name: r1
    description: x
    detector: x
    controls:
      - {framework: PCI-DSS, id: "6.5.1", title: x, url: https://x.com}
      - {framework: PCI-DSS, id: "6.5.7", title: x, url: https://x.com}
' > tree/a.yaml
